title: Contact Ofqual
body: "  We will process and handle your personal data in line with our personal information charter.   Public enquiries  You can get in touch with us if you have a question about the qualifications or awarding organisations we regulate.   Ask Ofqual questions   Complaints, whistleblowing, malpractice, maladministration or qualification fraud  Make a complaint, raise a concern, or report malpractice about an exam board, awarding organisation or qualification regulated by Ofqual.   Report a concern   Freedom of Information requests  The Freedom of Information Act gives you rights to access official information.  You might not need to make a request if we have:   already published the information on our website previously responded to an FOI request    Make a Freedom of Information Act request   "
